channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How personal style and clothing choices influence leadership perception and career success
item.description: This article explores how clothing and personal style can play a more strategic role in professional success than is often acknowledged, particularly for leaders. It highlights the idea that what prof...

item.title: DepEd outlines major education reforms for School Year 2026-2027, including a three-term calendar and improved teacher support
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) announced a package of reforms for School Year 2026-2027 aimed at improving student learning outcomes and providing stronger support for teachers across the Philipp...

item.title: Opinion Column Criticizes Trump Administration Over Alleged Conflicts of Interest and Democratic Oversight Efforts
item.description: This opinion article by Jason Miciak argues that Democratic lawmakers should do more to publicly document and challenge what the author describes as corruption within the Trump administration. The pie...

item.title: Guide to Installing and Testing Beta Apps with Apple's TestFlight on Mac, iPhone, and iPad
item.description: OSXDaily explains how Apple users can access and test pre-release applications through TestFlight, Apple's official platform for beta software distribution. TestFlight allows developers to share upcom...

item.title: Indiana Fever and New York Liberty Meet in Commissioner’s Cup Matchup with Playoff-Level Expectations
item.description: The article previews a highly anticipated WNBA Commissioner’s Cup game between the Indiana Fever and the New York Liberty at Barclays Center in Brooklyn. Both teams entered the matchup with positive m...

item.title: Police Recover P2.8 Million Worth of Dried Cannabis from Abandoned Vehicle in La Trinidad, Benguet
item.description: La Trinidad police in Benguet province successfully recovered more than P2.8 million worth of dried cannabis from an abandoned Mitsubishi Pajero sport utility vehicle in Barangay Puguis early Sunday m...

item.title: Robert Reich Argues Trump’s Presidency Has Renewed Public Awareness of Democratic Institutions and Constitutional Safeguards
item.description: In this opinion article, former U.S. Labor Secretary Robert Reich argues that although he strongly opposes Donald Trump and his administration, the Trump era may ultimately serve as a wake-up call tha...

item.title: Republican Critics Condemn Ed Martin's Social Media Post Suggesting Political Opponents Seek Violence
item.description: Former Justice Department official Ed Martin drew criticism from several conservatives, Republican figures, and journalists after posting a controversial message on X. In his post, Martin claimed that...

item.title: Critics Condemn Pete Hegseth's D-Day Remarks Linking Migration to Historical Invasions
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced widespread criticism after remarks delivered during an 82nd anniversary D-Day commemoration ceremony in Normandy. During his speech, Hegseth shifted from honoring ...

item.title: Sowore Rejects MTN CEO’s Position on Unlimited Data Plans, Threatens Nationwide Protest
item.description: Nigerian activist and former presidential candidate, Omoyele Sowore, has criticised the Chief Executive Officer of MTN Nigeria, Karl Toriola, over remarks concerning unlimited mobile data services. Du...

item.title: U.S. Investment in Venezuela Faces Uncertainty as Energy Companies Remain Cautious
item.description: A report published by The Washington Post and highlighted by Raw Story examines challenges facing the Trump administration's plans for Venezuela following a U.S. intervention earlier in 2026. Accordin...

item.title: Shield AI faces scrutiny after repeated V-BAT drone crashes, safety incidents and whistleblower allegations
item.description: Shield AI, a Silicon Valley defence technology company valued at approximately US$12.7 billion, is facing renewed scrutiny following a serious injury involving one of its V-BAT military drones. On 12 ...

item.title: Minamitorishima: Japan's Remote Island and Its Strategic Importance
item.description: Minamitorishima is a small, remote island located almost two thousand kilometers east of Tokyo, marking the easternmost point of Japan. Initially sighted in 1694 and briefly claimed by various explore...

item.title: Nick Valensi’s silence highlights an alternative approach to pro-Israel advocacy
item.description: In this opinion piece, Yoni Goldstein argues that silence can be a deliberate and effective form of pro-Israel advocacy, using Strokes guitarist Nick Valensi as a case study. The article contrasts the...

item.title: Retired Judges' Fraud Allegations in IRS Settlement Put Attorney General Todd Blanche Under Scrutiny
item.description: A political and legal analysis by federal trial attorney Sabrina Haake argues that President Donald Trump's decision to abandon a proposed $1.8 billion IRS-related settlement fund has not ended the co...

item.title: How Drones Are Reshaping Warfare in the Ukraine-Russia Conflict
item.description: This opinion article argues that the widespread use of drones has fundamentally transformed modern warfare, particularly in the Ukraine-Russia conflict. The author describes how the war evolved from f...

item.title: New targeted cancer drugs show promising results but chemotherapy remains essential for now
item.description: New research presented at the American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) conference in Chicago highlights significant progress in cancer treatment through precision-targeted drugs and personalized t...

item.title: Hunter Biden Gains Prominence on Social Media for Mocking MAGA Tactics
item.description: Hunter Biden, son of President Joe Biden, has been actively engaging on social media, using humor and self-deprecation to respond to critics and MAGA supporters. The article highlights how Hunter's po...
